title: Major Ethereum Client Releases and Network Upgrades
description: A timeline showing the major releases of different Ethereum client software (Geth, Nethermind, Besu, Erigon) aligned with key Ethereum network upgrades (hard forks).
relationships: Each client (Geth, Nethermind, etc.) must release a new version to be compatible with each network upgrade.
The timeline shows how client development is driven by the protocol's upgrade schedule.
